title: BigONE - Rekt
relevance_summary: Supply chain attack exploiting internal infrastructure modifications

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies critical contract functions during maintenance windows

red_flags: system maintenance announcement coinciding with large token outflows
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that modifies critical contract functions during maintenance windows
summary: BigONE suffered a supply chain attack where attackers modified internal infrastructure to drain funds. A guard could have blocked modifications during maintenance windows.
